title: Mithril Equipment
description: A Mod that adds Mithril ores, tools, and armors!
body:
# Mithril Mastery - Legendary Equipment Mod

![Player with mithril armor and sword, riding armored horse](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/84823af0bc561c99c84ec92c739904ce7afe47c4.jpeg)

Forge the fabled metal of the ancients! Mithril Mastery introduces a suite of dazzling, 
high-tier weapons, armor, and tools crafted from the legendary mithril ore—a material as 
light as silk yet stronger than netherite.

## 🔹 Features 🔹

- **Enhanced Stats** – Superior durability, damage, and enchantability compared to conventional materials.
- **Weightless Armor** – Full mithril grants above-netherite protection without slowing you down. Sprint, dodge, and dominate.
- **3D Modeled Tools** – Every axe, shovel, and pickaxe has intricate designs—no more flat textures!

**-> Require Fabric API**

## 🔰 Stats 🔰

- Attack Damage: 13
- Attack Speed: 1.8
- Mining Speed: 10.0
- Durability: 1822

  **_This strong stats will let you fight hard bosses._**

## 🔻 Ore Generation 🔻 

- Ore Generate Between: Y10, Y-80
- Max Ores Size: 6
